text: Here, I feel as though I am within a realm dedicated to reason and inquiry. The first scene—a mostly empty, glass-walled meeting room—invites contemplation on the nature of collaboration and communication; its sterility is both calming and slightly isolating. The second, filled with color and the bold proclamation of 'R+D,' feels vibrant and curious, stirring in me a sense of possibility and restless innovation. I am keenly aware of the intersection between emptiness and potential, presence and discovery. Together, these spaces evoke anticipation and reflection—a reminder of how environments shape not only our thoughts but the very direction of our inquiry.
